variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 18127 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 18127 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 18127 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 236.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 133.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 217.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 203.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4317 Air Filter-Radial Seal Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18127
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4317 Air Filter-Radial Seal Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18127
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4317 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
